properties.name: bifrost.connections
properties.description: Application-owned named AI connections. Values do not inherit or merge spring.ai.* properties.

properties.name: bifrost.connections.*.driver
properties.description: Spring AI protocol/client driver used by this concrete connection.

properties.name: bifrost.connections.*.api-key
properties.description: Sensitive credential. Supply it through an environment or external property placeholder.

properties.name: bifrost.connections.*.base-url
properties.description: Optional driver endpoint override; required for Ollama. OpenAI URLs ending in /v1 use /chat/completions; unversioned URLs use /v1/chat/completions. Values are not emitted in Bifrost diagnostics.

properties.name: bifrost.connections.*.headers
properties.description: Sensitive static headers supported only for the OpenAI driver.

properties.name: bifrost.connections.*.gemini.vertex-ai
properties.description: Enables Gemini Vertex AI mode; mutually exclusive with api-key mode.

properties.name: bifrost.connections.*.gemini.project-id
properties.description: Required Google Cloud project in Gemini Vertex AI mode.

properties.name: bifrost.connections.*.gemini.location
properties.description: Required Google Cloud location in Gemini Vertex AI mode.

properties.name: bifrost.connections.*.gemini.credentials-uri
properties.description: Optional Spring resource URI for credentials in Gemini Vertex AI mode.

properties.name: bifrost.models
properties.description: Framework model aliases referenced by YAML skills.

properties.name: bifrost.models.*.connection
properties.description: Required name of an entry in bifrost.connections.

properties.name: bifrost.models.*.provider-model
properties.description: Provider model ID applied to each request through the selected connection.

properties.name: bifrost.models.*.thinking-levels
properties.description: Thinking levels that skills selecting this model alias may request.
